languages.text: {n}Губернатор сердито сопит, его широкая грудь часто вздымается. Наконец, упрямый блеск в темных глазах смягчается, он отводит взгляд и шумно сглатывает.{/n} "Простите, Ваше Сиятельство, забылся... Ясик! Никаких ножей".

traits.locale_text: {n}Губернатор сердито сопит, его широкая грудь часто вздымается. Наконец, упрямый блеск в темных глазах смягчается, он отводит взгляд и шумно сглатывает. {/n}"Простите, Ваше Сиятельство, забылся... Ясик! Никаких ножей".

languages.text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."
languages.original_text: {n}Губернатор сердито сопит, его широкая грудь часто вздымается. Наконец, упрямый блеск в темных глазах смягчается, он отводит взгляд и шумно сглатывает.{/n} "Простите, Ваше Сиятельство, забылся... Ясик! Никаких ножей".

traits.locale_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his wide chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and gives a heavy swallow.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

{n}The governor huffs angrily, his wide chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and gives a heavy swallow.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

{n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

{n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

languages.text: {n}总督愤懑地喘着粗气，宽厚的胸膛急剧起伏。终于，他那黑眼睛里的倔强慢慢消退。他移开视线，重重咽了一口唾沫。{/n}“我向您赔罪，大人，刚才是我失态了……雅西克！刀的事就算了。”
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text: {n}总督愤懑地喘着粗气，宽厚的胸膛急剧起伏。终于，他那黑眼睛里的倔强慢慢消退。他移开视线，重重咽了一口唾沫。{/n}“我向您赔罪，大人，刚才是我失态了……雅西克！刀的事就算了。”

languages.text: {n}Vali öfkeyle ofluyor, geniş göğsü hızla inip kalkıyor. Sonunda koyu gözlerindeki inatçı kıvılcım sönüyor. Bakışlarını kaçırıyor ve zorlukla yutkunuyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yerimi unuttum... Yasik! Bıçakları unut."
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text: {n}Vali öfkeyle ofluyor, geniş göğsü hızla inip kalkıyor. Sonunda koyu gözlerindeki inatçı kıvılcım sönüyor. Bakışlarını kaçırıyor ve zorlukla yutkunuyor.{/n} "Özür dilerim {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri, yerimi unuttum... Yasik! Bıçakları unut."

languages.text: {n}Le gouverneur pousse un soupir agacé et sa respiration s'accélère, mais l'étincelle d'entêtement dans ses yeux sombres ne tarde pas à disparaître. Il détourne le regard et déglutit péniblement.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie, je me suis laissé emporter. Yasik ! On oublie les couteaux. »
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text: {n}Le gouverneur pousse un soupir agacé et sa respiration s'accélère, mais l'étincelle d'entêtement dans ses yeux sombres ne tarde pas à disparaître. Il détourne le regard et déglutit péniblement.{/n} « Toutes mes excuses, Votre Seigneurie, je me suis laissé emporter. Yasik ! On oublie les couteaux. »

languages.text: {n}El gobernador bufa, furioso, y su pecho se hincha y deshincha rápidamente. Por fin, la terquedad abandona sus ojos y traga saliva.{/n} «Discúlpeme, mi{mf|lord|lady}, he olvidado mi posición... ¡Yasik! Olvide los cuchillos».
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text: {n}El gobernador bufa, furioso, y su pecho se hincha y deshincha rápidamente. Por fin, la terquedad abandona sus ojos y traga saliva.{/n} «Discúlpeme, mi{mf|lord|lady}, he olvidado mi posición... ¡Yasik! Olvide los cuchillos».

languages.text: {n}Der Gouverneur schnaubt wütend und seine breite Brust hebt und senkt sich hektisch. Schließlich verschwindet das störrische Funkeln in seinen Augen. Er wendet seinen Blick ab und schluckt.{/n} "Tut mir Leid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich vergaß mich ... Yasik! Vergiss die Messer."
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text: {n}Der Gouverneur schnaubt wütend und seine breite Brust hebt und senkt sich hektisch. Schließlich verschwindet das störrische Funkeln in seinen Augen. Er wendet seinen Blick ab und schluckt.{/n} "Tut mir Leid, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}, ich vergaß mich ... Yasik! Vergiss die Messer."

languages.text:
{n}怒り心頭で胸を大きく上下に動かす知事。ついに、彼の黒い瞳に燃え上がる頑固な炎は消え去った。視線を逸らし、大きくのどを鳴らした。{/n}
「申し訳ございません、御{mf|殿|殿}様。我、失態を犯してしまいました...。ヤシク！包丁は忘れてください。」
languages.original_text: {n}The governor huffs angrily, his broad chest rising and falling rapidly. At last, the stubborn spark in his dark eyes fades. He averts his gaze and swallows heavily.{/n} "My apologies, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, I forgot myself... Yasik! Forget the knives."

traits.locale_text:
{n}怒り心頭で胸を大きく上下に動かす知事。ついに、彼の黒い瞳に燃え上がる頑固な炎は消え去った。視線を逸らし、大きくのどを鳴らした。{/n}
「申し訳ございません、御{mf|殿|殿}様。我、失態を犯してしまいました...。ヤシク！包丁は忘れてください。」
